summary: Frontend-only verification of the new 'Share Smart Link-In-Bio' strip in DashboardHeaderStrip. Logged in as avatartalk_test@example.com by seeding the Supabase session into localStorage (key 'sb-hnxnvdzrwbtmcohdptfq-auth-token'), then visited all 6 dashboard routes and exercised both buttons. All 5 acceptance criteria pass.
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardHeaderStrip.tsx is ~217 lines — still manageable but it now mixes header chrome, share strip, toast logic, and onboarding. Consider extracting the share strip into its own small component (e.g. ShareBioStrip.tsx) to keep DashboardHeaderStrip focused; would also let other layouts reuse the strip independently.
handleCopyProfileUrl swallows all clipboard errors into a single 'Copy failed' toast — fine, but consider logging the underlying error to console for easier debugging in mobile WebViews.

The same `showShareModal` state powers both the top-right 'Share' button (line 118) and the new 'share-bio-share-button' (line 196). That is intentional and correct, but worth a code comment so future devs don't think it's a duplicate state.

Unrelated console error observed on /settings/dashboard: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' — does NOT originate from ShareModal (which has a DialogTitle); likely a different dialog on that page. Worth a separate investigation but out of scope for this iteration.
test_credentials: avatartalk_test@example.com / TestPassword!234 (seeded into localStorage under key sb-hnxnvdzrwbtmcohdptfq-auth-token via Supabase password-grant)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Share Smart Link-In-Bio' strip lives in /app/frontend/src/components/DashboardHeaderStrip.tsx (rendered by DashboardPageLayout). Selectors: data-testid='share-bio-strip', 'share-bio-copy-button', 'share-bio-share-button', 'share-bio-url'. ShareModal title text is 'Share Your Bio Link' (use this to disambiguate from the top-right 'Share' button which opens the SAME modal — both buttons share the showShareModal state by design). Profile URL for the test user is http://localhost:3000/avatartalktest (username 'avatartalktest'). Login pattern that works: POST Supabase /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password then page.evaluate to set localStorage key 'sb-hnxnvdzrwbtmcohdptfq-auth-token' to the full JSON session. Grant clipboard-read/clipboard-write via context.grant_permissions to verify Copy.
